title: Mod Configs Wheel
description: Open different mods' configs from the wheel menu
body:
# Mod Configs Wheel

Fabric mod that adds a wheel selector for opening config menu's of different mods.  

Requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) installed.  

You can add multiple wheel pages & unlimited count of mods to the wheel.  

![preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DimasKama/ModConfigsWheel/refs/heads/master/img/wheel.png)
